project.name: Vietnamese Legal Assistant
project.description: An intelligent virtual assistant for looking up Vietnamese legal documents, calculating legal costs/penalties, and verifying civil legal conditions.

layers.name: Frontend & UI Layer
layers.description: Streamlit application and other user interface pages for interactive legal consultation.

layers.name: API & Server Layer
layers.description: FastAPI backend services, routing, auth, and MCP server wrappers for exposed tools.

layers.name: Core Agent & RAG Engine
layers.description: The LangGraph router, ReAct agent loop, metacognitive escalations, NeMo guardrails, and query rewriter.

layers.name: Data Pipeline & Database Layer
layers.description: MySQL schemas, migrations, Qdrant vectors, and Neo4j multi-hop graph database ingestion scripts.

layers.name: Model Serving & Finetuning Layer
layers.description: Local embedding servers, Cohere reranking configurations, and notebook workflows for LLM finetuning.

layers.name: System Evaluation & Testing Layer
layers.description: Pytest scenarios, pairwise judge panels, redteam probe generation, and performance benchmark suites.

layers.name: Infrastructure & Deployment Layer
layers.description: Container setups, celery workers, build files, AWS deploy scripts, and entry points.

layers.name: Configuration & Environment Layer
layers.description: Environment templates, dependencies manifests (requirements.txt, uv.lock), and lint/type check rules.

layers.name: Documentation Layer
layers.description: Codebase guide, architecture templates, developer guides, and general wiki documents.

tour.title: Welcome and Overview
tour.description: Start with the project README to get a high-level overview of the Vietnamese Legal RAG and Agentic Chatbot system, including key system architectures and ingestion pipelines.

tour.title: Application Entrypoint & Server Routing
tour.description: Explore the backend FastAPI application in app.py which defines all HTTP routing, CORS setups, Celery tasks integrations, and SSE streaming for traces.

tour.title: User Interface (Streamlit)
tour.description: Examine the Streamlit frontend chat UI that communicates with the FastAPI server via Server-Sent Events (SSE) to render chat histories, trace steps, and legal sources.

tour.title: Core Agent Logic & LangGraph Router
tour.description: Dive into the LangGraph router and workflow loop, which controls state check-pointing, metacognitive escalations, and ReAct agent routing rules.

tour.title: Input Guardrails & Self-Corrective RAG
tour.description: See how NeMo Guardrails intercept toxic queries, and check the self-corrective RAG flow which grades retrieved sources and rewrites queries when needed.

tour.title: Vietnamese Legal Calculators and Tools
tour.description: Review the specific legal calculations implemented as ReAct agent tools: penalty calculations, court fees, vehicle registration fees, child support, and severance pay.

tour.title: Hybrid Retrieval & Database Connectors
tour.description: Understand how documents are indexed in Qdrant (for vector/BM25 search) and Neo4j (for multi-hop statute relationships).

tour.title: System Evaluation & Redteaming
tour.description: Learn about the evaluation system that uses pairwise judging, DeepEval pipelines, and OTel bridges to monitor and test generation/retrieval quality.
